title: pectis stenophylla var. biaristata
intro: Pectis stenophylla var. biaristata, also known as a type of plant in the daisy family, is a perennial herb native to parts of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Pectis stenophylla var. biaristata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the roots to create a tincture.
